title: speedscope
summary:
? A fast, interactive web-based viewer for performance profiles. 
 English .README-zhCN.md A fast, interactive web-based viewer for performance profiles. Supports import from a variety of profiles in a variety of languages JS, Ruby, Python, Go more. Try it here httpswww.speedscope.app Given raw profiling data, speedscope allows you to interactively explore the data to get insight into what's slow in your application, or allocating all the memory, or whatever data is represented in the profiling
